doc: Central registry of LLM model identifiers used across my projects. Each project pins logical 'roles' (e.g. extractor.primary) to a named alias; aliases resolve to a concrete vendor + model_id. When a vendor deprecates a model, update the alias once here and every project picks up the new model on its next config fetch. Public on purpose: model identifiers are not secrets.

extractor.notes: Default workhorse for structured-output extraction, judging, and most non-trivial reasoning. Pricing tier: medium.

extractor_retry.notes: Higher-capability fallback when the primary extractor fails (schema mismatch, refusal, etc.). Pricing tier: highest.

judge_cheap.notes: High-volume / low-stakes classification (HTML scanning, dedup pre-filter). Pricing tier: lowest.

agent_websearch.notes: Sonnet via claude-agent-sdk with WebSearch + WebFetch tools enabled.
